name: Stir-Fried Tofu with Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cornstarch with the stock in a shallow dish and keep ready.
2. Prepare tofu according to your favorite method. Slice into half-inch blocks, press with paper towels to remove excess water (or use frozen tofu).
3. In a shallow dish, combine sherry, salt, pepper, soy sauce, sugar, and 1 1/2 tbsp oil. Marinate tofu for 15 minutes.
4. Heat remaining oil in a wok or pan over high heat.
5. Add ginger and onion; stir-fry for 1 1/2 minutes.
6. Remove onions and set aside to drain. Use the oil left in the pan if sufficient.
7. Return oil to heat, then add tofu (or steak) and garlic.
8. Stir-fry tofu (or steak) and garlic until browned.
9. Mix in drained onions and ginger; stir-fry for 1 minute.
10. Add cornstarch mixture and cook, stirring until thickened.
11. Serve with steamed rice or noodles. Enjoy!
